## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why? Link the issue/ADR it addresses. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `go build ./...`, `go test ./...`, and `go vet ./...` pass
- [ ] No premium imports added to OSS core (`make separability` passes)
- [ ] Public surfaces unchanged, or the change is intentional (proto/config are the stable contracts)
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] CLA signed (the bot will prompt)
